summary: Policy Acknowledgement and Document Verification System testing complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI verified with Playwright - Policies tab shows assigned policies with status badges, signature information (employee name, date/time, admin name, date/time), and action buttons. Policy Assignments page accessible from sidebar navigation.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/policies/assign - assigns policy to employee with audit log
✅ Backend: PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/view - marks policy as viewed
✅ Backend: PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/acknowledge - employee acknowledges with timestamp
✅ Backend: PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/admin-review - admin reviews acknowledged policy
✅ Backend: GET /api/policy-assignments?employee_id={id} - returns assignments with all fields
✅ Backend: GET /api/audit-logs?entity_id={id}&compliance_only=true - returns compliance audit trail
✅ Backend: Duplicate acknowledgement correctly rejected (400 error)
✅ Backend: Admin review of unacknowledged policy correctly rejected (400 error)
✅ Frontend: Policy Assignments page accessible from sidebar navigation
✅ Frontend: Employee Profile -> Policies tab shows assigned policies
✅ Frontend: Status badges (Pending, Viewed, Acknowledged, Reviewed & Approved) displayed
✅ Frontend: Employee Acknowledgement section shows name and date/time
✅ Frontend: Admin Review section shows name and date/time
✅ Frontend: 'I have read and understood this policy' button present for unacknowledged
✅ Frontend: 'Reviewed and Approved' button present for admin after acknowledgement
✅ Frontend: 'View Policy' button opens policy document
critical_code_review_comments: Policy acknowledgement workflow is audit-safe with proper timestamps and identity tracking
All compliance actions are logged to audit_logs collection with compliance_only filter support
Frontend correctly displays signature information with employee name, date/time and admin name, date/time
seed_data_creation: Used existing test employee: Olakunle Alonge (ID: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77) with Health & Safety Policy already acknowledged and admin-reviewed. Policy assignments verified with full audit trail.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Policy Acknowledgement System fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/policies/assign, PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/view, PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/acknowledge, PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/admin-review. Frontend Policies tab on Employee Profile shows complete workflow with signature information. Test employee Olakunle Alonge has 3 policy assignments all acknowledged and admin-reviewed. Audit logs filter with compliance_only=true returns policy_assigned, policy_viewed, policy_acknowledged, policy_admin_reviewed actions.
